events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: the epoxy-vs-cementitious mismatch is a sequence violation (substrate moisture prep and form/release materials must follow the confirmed grout type, not the reverse), so the current pour is defective — work must stop, the misapplied grout must be chipped out, the correct grout type confirmed against drawings, and substrate prep redone before re-pouring and inspecting.
